creator: evn@opp.tusur.ru
text:
I noticed, that page http://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies.html has some broken links, cause of 404 error at the site they are linked to.
They are:
UNIX Introductory Course (http://8help.osu.edu/wks/unix_course/), UNIX System Administration Course (http://8help.osu.edu/wks/sysadm_course/), and FAQ link http://www.faqs.org/faqs/unix-faq/user-friendly/index.html
